# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: **CA**, District: **17**
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: (blank)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Report type: [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- Stamp: HAND DELIVERED, 2019 JUN 11 PM 1:44; "(For Official Use Only)"; handwritten page label "1 of 8"

The transaction grid contains only the printed **Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock** row (JT, Sale, 02/05/015, 03/07/15, amount B). The first data row reads **"Please see the attached"** with all checkboxes empty. No real transaction data on this page.
